-  kCTFontManufacturerNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontManufacturerNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontManufacturerNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanufacturernamekey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the manufacturer name.
